response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, alongside deep expertise in backend development (Java, Kotlin, Python, D) and cloud infrastructure. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure, real-time systems, and enterprise automation aligns well with the role's requirements. While he lacks explicit Nest.js experience, his adaptability to new frameworks and commitment to best practices (TDD, CI/CD) mitigate this concern.
strengths: Proven track record in full-stack development with modern TypeScript/Node.js/React stack
Strong backend experience across multiple languages (Java, Kotlin, Python, D) and databases (PostgreSQL, MongoDB)
Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and AI-agent development
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js (primary stack requirement)
No clear mention of Vitest testing framework in recent roles
Gaps in employment history (2022-2023) and shorter tenures at some companies
